title: Breakout Watch: Renewable Energy Leader Powers Into New Buy Zone
text: As infrastructure leader Quanta Services expands its renewable energy footprint, PWR stock powers into a new buy zone. The post Breakout Watch: Renewable Energy Leader Powers Into New Buy Zone appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Quanta Services (PWR) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Quanta Services (PWR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.99% and 5.26%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Quanta Services (PWR) to Post Q2 Earnings: What to Expect?
text: More demand for infrastructure solutions that help support customers' energy-transition initiatives and modernization will likely aid Quanta Services' (PWR) Q2 results.
